sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 221 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27 2. For orders on CMA No.1381/2025 3. For hearing of main case 16.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Adil Saeed, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 17.03.2023, learned counsel for respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. It is jointly stated that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the applicant arising here from. The reference application is disposed of in terms as aforesaid. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
